title: phalaris arundinacea var. coarctata
intro: Phalaris arundinacea var. coarctata, also known as dwarf reed grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the grass family and is native to Europe. The medicinal properties of Phalaris arundinacea var. coarctata include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as bloating and indigestion, due to its prebiotic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower cholesterol levels and reduce inflammation in the body, making it a promising natural remedy for cardiovascular health. Phalaris arundinacea var. coarctata can be prepared into herbal supplements, teas, or infusions, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
